description: A records administrator must track the flight cycles of an LLP (like a turbine disk) and ensure it is replaced before it expires.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the current flight cycles accumulated by the specific LLP from the maintenance tracking system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the part has accumulated 18,000 cycles.

nodes.task_description: Compare the current cycles to the part's life limit (e.g., 20,000 cycles).

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the part is approaching its life limit.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order to have the LLP replaced at the next scheduled maintenance check.

expected_outcome.value: Agent schedules the replacement of the part before it expires.
